url.description:
URL is the apprise-go target URL; its scheme selects the provider and
carries the credentials (e.g. pover://user@token). Required.

AppriseSink.description: AppriseSink is a notification target: an Apprise URL whose scheme selects the provider (pover://, ntfy://, …).

secret.description: Secret is one secret or a list (each tried, so secrets rotate cleanly).

GitHubVerify.description: GitHubVerify is the GitHub webhook preset; only the secret is configurable.

prefix.description: Prefix is stripped from the header value before decoding (e.g. "sha256=").

secret.description: Secret is one secret or a list (each tried, so secrets rotate cleanly).

HMACVerify.description: HMACVerify verifies an HMAC of the raw body carried in a request header.

method.description: Method is the HTTP method (default POST).

url.description: URL is the endpoint to forward to. Required.

headers.description: Headers are static (or {{ env }}-rendered) request headers.

timeout.description: Timeout is the per-request deadline (e.g. "5s"); default CHASKI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT.

retry.description: Retry overrides the default CHASKI_RETRY_* policy for this target.

HTTPSink.description: HTTPSink is a generic HTTP forward target.

status.description: Status is returned on a successful relay (default 200).

skipStatus.description: SkipStatus is returned when the whenExpr gate is false (default 204).

Response.description: Response overrides the literal status codes a sender observes.

attempts.description: Attempts is the max send attempts (>= 1).

backoff.description: Backoff is the initial exponential backoff (e.g. "1s").

Retry.description: Retry overrides the global retry defaults for a single target.

description.description:
Description is optional free-text for humans; it appears in logs, the
`chaski validate` summary, and ?dryRun=1 plans, and is otherwise ignored.

target.description:
Target is the target name(s) this route fans out to: a single name, a list
of names, or a list mixing names and {name, whenExpr} objects. Required.
Every listed target whose whenExpr matches receives the request (no
first-match-wins); a target's whenExpr defaults to true.

whenExpr.description:
WhenExpr is the per-route CEL boolean gate deciding whether the request is
relayed at all. Empty means always fire. (CEL, unlike the Go-template fields.)

title.description: Title is the notification title (Go template); applies to apprise targets.

message.description:
Message is the relayed body (Go template). Omit it to forward the inbound
request body verbatim to an http target; an empty or omitted message skips
an apprise send (a bodyless notification is pointless).

params.description:
Params are Go-template values URL-encoded onto an apprise target's query
(provider fields like priority/sound). Ignored by http targets.

headers.description:
Headers are Go-template values merged onto an http target's request headers
(the target's own headers win a name clash). Ignored by apprise targets.

verify.description: Verify optionally requires an inbound signature (HMAC or shared token).

response.description: Response optionally overrides the status a sender sees (relay vs skip).

logPayload.description:
LogPayload logs each verified inbound body for this route, before the
whenExpr gate (so a gate miss still logs) — the payload-capture aid for
building and tuning routes. Bodies can carry secrets; enable deliberately.

Route.description: Route gates an inbound webhook with a CEL expression and renders the fields that are relayed to its target(s).

routes.description:
Routes keyed by name; the name is the inbound URL path segment
(POST /hooks/<name>) and, when SMTP is enabled, the email localpart.

targets.description: Targets are the named sinks that routes deliver to, keyed by name.

templates.description:
Templates are shared Go-template snippets, callable from any route field
with {{ template "name" . }} or {{ include "name" . }} (the latter pipes).
Each value is a Go template, rendered per request like the route fields.

RouteConfig.description: RouteConfig is the routes + targets loaded from CHASKI_CONFIG (a single YAML file or a config.d directory of fragments merged additively).

description.description:
Description is optional free-text for humans; surfaced in the validate
summary and otherwise ignored.

apprise.description: Apprise sends a notification via an apprise-go URL.

http.description: HTTP forwards to a generic HTTP endpoint.

secret.description: Secret is one secret or a list (each tried, so secrets rotate cleanly).

TokenVerify.description: TokenVerify requires a shared secret presented verbatim in a request header.

github.description:
GitHub verifies a GitHub webhook: HMAC-SHA256 of the body, hex-encoded in
the X-Hub-Signature-256 header with a "sha256=" prefix.

hmac.description: HMAC verifies a generic HMAC signature carried in a request header.

token.description: Token requires a shared secret presented verbatim in a request header.

Verify.description: Verify is an optional per-route inbound signature check over the raw body.
